title: actlint action-risk to MCP-hint mapping
description: Expresses actlint's five risk dimensions in terms of MCP's four annotation booleans, so a finding stays legible to anyone who knows MCP. The discipline it encodes: a verdict fires only where an MCP hint exists to be honest or dishonest about. Dimensions with no corresponding hint (reversibility, blastRadius) are supporting context only.

mcpHint.description: The MCP annotation this dimension corresponds to, or null when the protocol defines no such field.

raisesVerdict.description: Whether a declared-vs-derived gap on this dimension may raise a verdict. True only where an MCP hint exists; dimensions with no hint enrich the explanation but never invent a compliance failure.
